summary: Evidence packet for the runx sbom-maker skill (umbtest03/sbom-maker@sha-b0be55e0ee89). A real post-publish dogfood run of the published package produced a sealed runx.receipt.v1 that passes runx verify with a production signature. The SBOM extracted 2 components (express 4.18.2 GPL-3.0, lodash 4.17.21 MIT) and flagged the GPL-3.0 dependency as a high license risk. source_url, X.yaml, SKILL.md and verification.json all resolve at a single source revision (commit 66816d9a2ee8d700473738a93e0a40444dd88664); this evidence packet and the report are committed as its direct child and describe that same revision.

license_risks.reason: GPL-3.0 may trigger viral licensing requirements

observations.value: Published package installs cleanly from the remote registry (runx add: source=remote, status=installed); harness cases validate: WSL local `runx harness ./skills/sbom-maker` passed 2/2 with 0 assertion errors (supported-lockfile sealed, unsupported-lockfile refused). Environment: WSL Linux local + remote registry install.

observations.value: Install: runx add umbtest03/sbom-maker@sha-b0be55e0ee89 --registry https://api.runx.ai. Run: runx skill umbtest03/sbom-maker@sha-b0be55e0ee89 --registry https://api.runx.ai --json -i lockfile_type=npm-shrinkwrap --input-json lockfile='<lockfile-json>' -R ./receipts. Verify: runx verify --receipt <receipt.json> --json (expects valid=true, signature_mode=production).
observations.detail: End-to-end install/run/verify for a new user without private context.
